title: NHS-ester-protein-labeling
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"98stl","text":"Protocol for labeling a purified protein with an NHS ester fluorescent dye.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ue66","text":"-ATTO565 NHS ester (Sigma Cat. #72464)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8h5iv","text":"-Purifiedunlabeled protein","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1tmbt","text":"-G-25 desalting column (Cytiva Cat. #28918007)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ndhv","text":"-Labeling buffer: 50mM HEPES pH8.0, 150mM NaCl, 2mM TCEP","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6fbtf","text":"-Quench buffer: 50mM Tris pH 8.0, 150mM NaCl, 2mM TCEP","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f22hs","text":"-Nanodrop spectrophotometer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mix 40μM unlabeled protein with 80μM ATTO 565 NHS ester dye in labeling buffer.
Buffer exchange the reaction into quench buffer over a pre-equilibrated G-25 desalting column.
Assess labeling efficiency by measuring the ratio of absorbance at 280 and 564 nm, correcting for dye absorbance at 280nm, using a Nanodrop spectrophotometer
creator: Liv Jensen
